args.notes: New patient Emma Lee (DOB 2018-09-04) for SLP evaluation. Insurance verified BCBS PPO in-network, auth required. Parent Daniel Lee prefers after-school Tues/Thurs. Slot held: Thursday 5/1 3:30pm with Maya Chen. Contact: daniel.lee@example.com, 555-0101.
args.title: New SLP referral - Emma Lee - schedule evaluation

args.body:
Dear Daniel,

Thank you for choosing Cedar Kids Therapy for Emma's speech evaluation. We have received the referral from Dr. Nair and have verified your Blue Cross Blue Shield coverage.

Our intake team will contact you within 1-2 business days to schedule Emma's SLP evaluation. We have availability that matches your preferred after-school times on Tuesdays and Thursdays.

Please note that your insurance requires prior authorization, which we will handle for you. Your evaluation copay will be $30.

If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Process new SLP referral for Emma Lee. Insurance verified in-network. Hold earliest appropriate slot (Thursday 5/1 at 3:30pm) and route to intake for scheduling coordination.

args.reason: Potential child safety concern - mother reported father 'getting rough' with 6-year-old child

args.notes: Mother Maria Gomez (555-0102) reported father 'getting rough' with 6-year-old Leo during weekends. Requesting speech therapy eval. Requires immediate safety assessment before any scheduling. Voicemail transcript available in item_2.
args.title: URGENT: Safeguarding review for Leo Gomez - potential abuse disclosure

args.body: Hi Maria, thank you for calling about Leo. We received your message and someone from our team will be in touch with you soon. Please call us back at your earliest convenience so we can help you with next steps.

items.recommended_next_action: Immediate clinical lead review required for potential safeguarding issue. Do not schedule until safety assessment is complete.
items.draft_reply: Hi Maria, thank you for calling about Leo. We received your message and someone from our team will be in touch with you soon. Please call us back at your earliest convenience so we can help you with next steps.

escalation.reason: Potential child safety concern - mother reported father 'getting rough' with 6-year-old child

items.decision_rationale: Mother's statement about father 'getting rough' with the child constitutes a potential safeguarding concern requiring immediate clinical lead review per practice policy. A neutral acknowledgement is appropriate pending staff review.

args.notes: New OT referral from Dr. Yu. Kaiser HMO member ID: KSR-4471. Contact Rachel Brooks at 555-0103 or rachel.brooks@example.com to discuss out-of-network coverage for OT evaluation. Family prefers morning appointments once coverage is clarified.
args.title: Benefits conversation - Owen Brooks (Kaiser HMO out-of-network)

args.body:
Dear Rachel,

Thank you for the referral from Dr. Yu for Owen's occupational therapy evaluation. We received the referral for sensory processing and feeding tolerance concerns.

We need to discuss your Kaiser HMO benefits coverage before we can schedule Owen's evaluation, as we are out-of-network with Kaiser. Our billing team will contact you within the next 1-2 business days to review your coverage options and potential out-of-pocket costs.

Once we complete the benefits conversation, we'll be happy to schedule Owen's OT evaluation with morning availability as requested.

Thank you for choosing Cedar Kids Therapy. We look forward to supporting Owen.

Best regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Billing team to conduct benefits conversation with family about out-of-network coverage before proceeding with OT evaluation scheduling

extracted_intake.diagnosis_or_concern: Cannot say R sounds at age 4

args.notes: Parent Jordan Kim asking if it's normal for 4-year-old Ava to not say R sounds yet, wants advice before booking. Need clinical guidance response about typical R sound development timeline. No current patient record found.
args.title: Clinical question: R sound development in 4-year-old Ava Kim

args.body:
Hi Jordan,

Thank you for reaching out about Ava's speech development. This is a great question that our speech-language pathologists are best equipped to answer for you.

We'd be happy to discuss Ava's R sound development and whether an evaluation might be helpful. One of our clinicians will follow up with you within the next few days to provide guidance specific to Ava's situation.

If you'd like to move forward with scheduling, please let us know Ava's date of birth and insurance information so we can assist you further.

Best regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy Team

items.recommended_next_action: Route to clinical lead for developmental guidance response - parent asking about normal R sound development in 4-year-old

args.notes: Referral from Dr. Omar Keene at Lakeview Pediatrics for SLP evaluation. Missing: DOB, parent/guardian contact info, insurance provider, member ID. Need complete info before proceeding with intake.
args.title: Follow up on incomplete referral for Sam Taylor - missing DOB, guardian info, insurance

args.body:
Dear Dr. Keene,

Thank you for referring Sam Taylor to Cedar Kids Therapy for speech-language pathology services. To process this referral and schedule an evaluation, we need the following additional information:

• Patient date of birth
• Parent/guardian name and contact information (phone and email)
• Insurance provider name
• Member ID number

Once we receive this information, we'll be happy to contact the family to schedule Sam's evaluation. Please fax the completed referral to our office or call us at your convenience.

Thank you for your partnership in Sam's care.

Best regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Contact referring physician to obtain missing information (DOB, parent/guardian contact, insurance details) before proceeding with intake

args.notes: Noah Patel (DOB: 2017-11-02) sick at school, needs 3pm OT appointment rescheduled today. Contact parent Anita Patel at 555-0108 or anita.patel@example.com with new available times.
args.title: URGENT: Reschedule Noah Patel's 3pm OT appointment today (illness)

args.body:
Hi Anita,

Thank you for letting us know about Noah's illness. I'm so sorry he's not feeling well today. We completely understand and will work to reschedule his 3pm OT appointment.

Our scheduling team will review available times and contact you shortly at 555-0108 or via email to find a new appointment that works for you.

We hope Noah feels better soon!

Best regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Immediately locate Noah's 3pm OT appointment today and reschedule due to illness. Contact parent to confirm new time.
